note: Advisory sandbox reconciler. Emits CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED verdicts, never PASS. Read-only over the two P0 registries; the tool itself is the trust spine.
title: Founder-Trigger Retirement Reconciler (static, read-only, two P0 registries)

subject.note: reconciles retires_trigger_ids (loops file, 11 refs) against defined trigger_ids (registry triggers[], 4 defined); both files read-only, sha unchanged

finding.interpretation: 7 machine loops declare they retire founder triggers that the retirement registry never defines. Earned-autonomy accounting is wired to phantom trigger_ids; the registry only defines FT-TIER1-PARALLEL-ORCH, FT-KZ002-COPILOT-P4, FT-FOUNDER-OBSERVATION, FT-MERGE-T0-T1. REPORTED as a finding, not relaxed away.

what_it_proves: REAL registries -> CHECK_REJECTED citing 7 dangling retires_trigger_ids (loops declare retirements the registry never defines)
a MINIMAL MUTATION of the real registry (define every referenced trigger_id) reconciles clean -> CHECK_OK — the checker is not always-fail
seeding one dangling ref (FT-SEEDED-PHANTOM) into the clean copy flips it back -> CHECK_REJECTED (RED-before-GREEN, seed id cited)
removing a needed definition (FT-MERGE-T0-T1) from the clean copy re-rejects — invariant is never relaxed to admit dangling refs
running the reconciler leaves BOTH ground-truth files byte-identical (sha unchanged); tool is strictly read-only
verdict vocab CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never a bare governance PASS; exits NONZERO on any dangling ref (not always-exit-0)
chess_patches_applied: runs against the REAL registries and records CHECK_REJECTED with the 7 real dangling refs (no strawman)
positive proof is a minimally-mutated registry that legitimately reconciles clean; no invariant relaxation
reads both files, never writes to either (Lock 5 / read-only)
origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none; reports the dangling refs as a finding, never its own PASS
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (both registries unmodified, sha unchanged)

results.pytest: env-blocked: pluggy absent on disk repo-wide (same failure on GV-1's test); test file is pytest-shaped, self-runner is the operative proof

exit_gate_B2: WI-4 done (static reconciler surfaces 7 real dangling retires_trigger_ids by finding; RED-before-GREEN via seeded phantom + minimal-mutation clean positive).
next_action: Escalate the 7 dangling retires_trigger_ids finding: either the retirement registry must define these founder triggers, or the loops must drop the phantom retires_trigger_ids.
